impact: V1L BL=1.0 is good (NULL 0.0dB). BL=0.65/0.30 show +4-7dB error. The kDryGain[3] pre-scale fixed V2 completely (BL=0.50 NULL +16.8 -> -0.1dB) but only improved V1L (+6.8 -> +6.1dB): the residual is NodalCircuit impedance loading inside the BLEND stage itself, which a pre-scale cannot fix. Needs a resistor-ratio fix in the stage, not a scalar.
title: V1L blend residual at partial BLEND settings
